task_description: Follow-up to task-0001, which identified AI tools, SaaS, and finance as the three highest affiliate-conversion niches on X/Threads (recurring-commission SaaS programs, entrepreneur/marketer audience skew). Batch 1-2 content has focused on the AI-tools niche. This batch: (1) research the SaaS and finance niches specifically as the next content pillar -- real affiliate programs, commission structures, and audience overlap/differentiation from the AI-tools niche already covered; (2) research current (2026) posting cadence and format best practices for X/Threads specifically for whichever of these two niches looks strongest, so marketing/doc_creation have a concrete cadence to work from, not just topics. Cite sources. Do not fabricate commission rates or program terms -- state clearly if a program's real terms cannot be found.
next_action: Review the handoff and, if approved, continue through the existing execution flow.
